rationale: The sole ground-truth inline concern (reviewer yenuo26 asking whether reduce_scatter/device_communicator assertions should also cover _TP) is exactly what Candidate Y flags as its top finding, with precise line references and a concrete fix — X never mentions it and instead rubber-stamps an APPROVE with only one soft, non-actionable stylistic comment. Y's other findings (stale comment, missing test coverage for cfg_parallel_size=1, missing getattr guard, missing docstring) are all grounded in real diff hunks with specific file:line evidence, though some are minor/nitpicky. X's verification claims are accurate but constitute assessment rather than actionable findings, leaving it with near-zero recall against the ground truth.
